description: DASHBOARD_DOCKING_SPEC Phase C — dashboard panel popout windows. ADDITIVE beside default.json (which is scoped to 'main' only). Scoped to BOTH the host window ('main') and every popout ('popout-*'): a popout window is NOT covered by default.json's ['main'] scope, so WITHOUT this file every listen/emit/close call inside a popout is ACL-denied (Phase A finding). The two genuinely-new permissions vs core:default are core:webview:allow-create-webview-window (window creation is security-gated, NOT in core:default) and core:webview:allow-get-all-webviews (enumerate live windows; exact id — NOT '...-webview-windows'). The event permissions are re-granted here because the popout window does not inherit default.json's core:default. No fs/dialog/updater — popouts are pure render-plane subscribers.
